creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have prepared a new patch that should fix all but 8 of the failures.  I am going to need help from someone who is willing to investigate how to properly pass Fortran flags to fix the others.

All but one of these ports are leaf ports and the other has only one dependency.  We are at the point of diminishing returns.

See new attachment.  It subsumes the bsd.gcc.mk patch.
